case_title: MERCURY INSURANCE COMPANY VS. ARMANDO COVARRUBIAS et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-29-2003 CONTINUED TO MAR-12-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). JAN-29-2003 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
